blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 22 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,303 ft. Looking ahead, 36 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Tomorrow: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 31.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 20" over the past week. Current depth: 53".
